auth_note: All endpoints require JWT. Use seeded test users: VIEWER (viewer@nexa-erp.dev, VIEWER), STAFF (staff@nexa-erp.dev, STAFF), MANAGER (manager@nexa-erp.dev, MANAGER), ADMIN (admin@nexa-erp.dev, SUPER_ADMIN). Password: NexaDev2026!. RBAC hierarchy: VIEWER < STAFF < MANAGER < ADMIN < SUPER_ADMIN. Template CRUD and role-defaults require ADMIN+. Notification and preference endpoints require STAFF+.

uuid_rules.note: Zod schema validates UUID v4 format. Non-v4 UUIDs (e.g. 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000999) are rejected as 400 before reaching the service layer.

setup_dependencies: Redis running (for BullMQ notification dispatch queues)
Seeded users with VIEWER, STAFF, MANAGER, SUPER_ADMIN roles
Seeded NotificationTemplates (11+ templates including APPROVAL_REQUESTED, INVOICE_APPROVED, etc.)
Event bus operational (for notification event subscribers)
state_machine_note: Notification status state machine (§17.2): PENDING → DELIVERED → READ | PENDING → DELIVERED → DISMISSED | PENDING → FAILED. Only DELIVERED → READ and DELIVERED → DISMISSED are valid user-initiated transitions.

endpoints.description: Authenticate user and return JWT (prerequisite for all other tests)

test_cases.name: Login as admin - happy path
Login as staff - happy path
Login as manager - happy path
Login as viewer - happy path

endpoints.description: Create a new notification template (ADMIN only)

test_cases.name: Create template - happy path with all fields

body.name: Invoice Approved Notification E9 Plan
body.description: Sent when an invoice is approved by a manager
body.bodyTemplate: Your invoice {{invoiceNumber}} for {{customerName}} ({{amount}}) has been approved.

db_verification.query: SELECT id, code, name, event_name, is_active FROM notification_templates WHERE code = 'TEST_INVOICE_APPROVED_E9_PLAN'

test_cases.name: Create template - minimal required fields only

body.name: Minimal Template E9 Plan
body.bodyTemplate: This is a minimal test notification.

db_verification.query: SELECT id, code, default_priority, is_active FROM notification_templates WHERE code = 'TEST_MINIMAL_E9_PLAN'

test_cases.name: Create template - missing required field 'code' returns 400
Create template - missing required field 'eventName' returns 400
Create template - empty defaultChannels array returns 400
Create template - invalid channel enum value returns 400
Create template - invalid priority enum returns 400
Create template - VIEWER denied (403)
Create template - STAFF denied (403)
Create template - MANAGER denied (403)
Create template - no auth token returns 401

endpoints.description: Get unread notification count for the authenticated user (STAFF+)

test_cases.name: Unread count - happy path
Unread count - VIEWER denied (403)
Unread count - no auth returns 401
Mark as read - happy path (requires DELIVERED notification)
test_cases.note: Requires a DELIVERED notification to exist for the staff user. Create one via event bus or direct DB insert before running.

db_verification.query: SELECT status, read_at FROM notifications WHERE id = '{{DELIVERED_NOTIFICATION_ID}}'

test_cases.name: Mark as read - not found (valid UUID, no record)
Mark as read - invalid UUID returns 400
Mark as read - VIEWER denied (403)
Dismiss notification - happy path (requires DELIVERED or READ notification)
test_cases.note: Requires a DELIVERED or READ notification to exist for the staff user.

test_cases.name: Dismiss notification - not found (valid UUID)
Dismiss notification - invalid UUID returns 400
Dismiss notification - VIEWER denied (403)

endpoints.description: Mark all unread notifications as read for the authenticated user (STAFF+)

test_cases.name: Mark all as read - happy path

db_verification.query: SELECT count(*) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000010' AND status = 'DELIVERED'
db_verification.expected: count = 0 (all DELIVERED notifications are now READ)

test_cases.name: Mark all as read - no unread notifications returns updated=0
Mark all as read - VIEWER denied (403)

test_cases.name: Get preferences - returns all active templates with source field

expected.assertion: items count matches active NotificationTemplate count. Each item has source field (USER, ROLE_DEFAULT, or TEMPLATE_DEFAULT)

test_cases.name: Get preferences - admin user gets preferences too
Get preferences - VIEWER denied (403)

endpoints.description: Bulk upsert notification preferences for the authenticated user (STAFF+)

test_cases.name: Update preferences - happy path (toggle off email for APPROVAL_REQUESTED)

db_verification.query: SELECT enable_in_app, enable_email, enable_push FROM notification_preferences WHERE user_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000010' AND notification_template_id = '61ecee83-280e-47b1-8064-6af66355a387'

test_cases.name: Update preferences - bulk update multiple templates

db_verification.query: SELECT count(*) FROM notification_preferences WHERE user_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000010' AND notification_template_id IN ('61ecee83-280e-47b1-8064-6af66355a387', 'dbf1ae7e-4566-4cea-852c-3cf40c6a9863')

test_cases.name: Update preferences - with priority override and mute

db_verification.query: SELECT priority_override, is_muted, mute_until FROM notification_preferences WHERE user_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000010' AND notification_template_id = 'e485c9ab-ca3e-4b6b-8dce-d536e4e50605'
db_verification.expected: priority_override='URGENT', is_muted=true, mute_until IS NOT NULL
